LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Spawn_Hostile_Animal.label: hostile animal
LanguageData.FCP_MedXAddiction.description: A chemical addiction to Med-X. Long-term presence of Med-X has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug.Without regular doses of Med-X, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_MedXAddiction.label: Med-X addiction
LanguageData.FCP_MedXAddiction.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_MedXTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to Med-X. The more severe this tolerance is, the more Med-X it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_MedXTolerance.label: Med-X tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Buffout.description: A chemical addiction to Buffout. Long-term presence of Buffout has caused neurological and physiological adaptations, so the body can no longer function properly without the drug. Without regular doses of Buffout, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the body to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Buffout.label: Buffout addiction
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Buffout.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_DaddyO.description: A chemical addiction to Daddy-O. Long-term presence of Daddy-O has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug.\n\nWithout regular doses of Daddy-O, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_DaddyO.label: Daddy-O addiction
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_DaddyO.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_DayTripper.description: A chemical addiction to Day Tripper. Long-term presence of Day Tripper has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug.\n\nWithout regular doses of Day Tripper, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_DayTripper.label: Day Tripper addiction
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_DayTripper.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Jet.description: A chemical addiction to Jet. Long-term presence of Jet has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug. Without regular doses of Jet, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Jet.label: Jet addiction
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Jet.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Mentats.description: A psychological addiction to Mentats. The brain has become dependent on the cognitive enhancement, and withdrawal causes severe mental fog and confusion.Without regular doses of Mentats, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will allow the brain to recover its natural function, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Mentats.label: Mentats addiction
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Mentats.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Psycho.description: A chemical addiction to Psycho. Long-term presence of Psycho has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug. Without regular doses of Psycho, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Psycho.label: Psycho addiction
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Psycho.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Slasher.description: A chemical addiction to Slasher. Long-term presence of Slasher has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug. Without regular doses of Slasher, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Slasher.label: Slasher addiction
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Slasher.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Ultrajet.description: A chemical addiction to Ultrajet. Long-term presence of Ultrajet has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug.\n\nWithout regular doses of Ultrajet, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Ultrajet.label: Ultrajet addiction
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Ultrajet.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_AddictolRecovery.description: Undergoing addiction treatment from Addictol. Feeling exhausted but addictions are being purged.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_AddictolRecovery.label: addictol treatment
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Auto_Stimpak.description: An automated delivery system that dispenses a standard stimpak dose when injuries are detected.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Auto_Stimpak.label: auto-stimpak
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Auto_Super_Stimpak.descriptio: An automated delivery system loaded with super stimpak formula for rapid emergency healing.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Auto_Super_Stimpak.label: auto-super stimpak
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_BerryMentatsHigh.description: Enhanced charisma and social skills from Berry Mentats.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_BerryMentatsHigh.label: high on berry Mentats
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_BloodPackHigh.description: Fresh blood is restoring blood volume and promoting healing. The transfusion helps stabilize the patient.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_BloodPackHigh.label: blood transfusion
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_BuffoutHigh.description: Enhanced by Buffout. Strength, carrying capacity, and melee damage significantly increased.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_BuffoutHigh.label: high on Buffout
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_BuffoutTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to Buffout. The more severe this tolerance is, the more Buffout it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_BuffoutTolerance.label: Buffout tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_CateyeHigh.description: Enhanced by Cateye. Vision significantly improved, especially in low light conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_CateyeHigh.label: cateye vision
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DaddyOHigh.description: Enhanced intelligence and perception but reduced social skills from Daddy-O.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DaddyOHigh.label: high on Daddy-O
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DaddyOTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to Daddy-O. The more severe this tolerance is, the more Daddy-O it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DaddyOTolerance.label: Daddy-O tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DayTripperHigh.description: Enhanced mood and charisma from Day Tripper.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DayTripperHigh.label: high on Day Tripper
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DayTripperTolerance.descripti: A built-up tolerance to Day Tripper. The more severe this tolerance is, the more Day Tripper it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DayTripperTolerance.label: Day Tripper tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Diluted_Stimpak.description: A watered-down stimulation pack that provides minor healing over time. The chemicals cause mild discomfort during healing.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Diluted_Stimpak.label: diluted stimpak
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DixonsJetHigh.description: Under the effects of Dixon's Jet, a premium refined variant. The purer formula provides stronger and longer-lasting speed enhancement with reduced side effects.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DixonsJetHigh.label: dixon's Jet high
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DoctorsBagHigh.description: Comprehensive medical treatment is repairing injuries and crippled limbs. The extensive field surgery provides substantial healing over time.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_DoctorsBagHigh.label: field surgery
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_FixerRecovery.description: Undergoing addiction treatment from Fixer. Feeling fatigued but withdrawal symptoms are reduced.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_FixerRecovery.label: fixer treatment
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_GrapeMentatsHigh.description: Balanced enhancement of intelligence and charisma from Grape Mentats.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_GrapeMentatsHigh.label: high on grape Mentats
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_HealingPowderHigh.description: Traditional wasteland medicine is providing gradual healing. The mixture of broc flower and xander root promotes natural tissue regeneration.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_HealingPowderHigh.label: healing powder
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_HydraHigh.description: Hydra is rapidly regenerating damaged tissue and healing crippled limbs. The process is intense and causes disorientation.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_HydraHigh.label: Hydra
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_JetHigh.description: Enhanced by Jet. Movement speed and work speed dramatically increased.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_JetHigh.label: high on Jet
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_JetTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to Jet. The more severe this tolerance is, the more Jet it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_JetTolerance.label: Jet tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_MedXHigh.description: Med-X is blocking pain signals and providing damage resistance. The powerful analgesic effect makes injuries less debilitating.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_MedXHigh.label: Med-X
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_MentatsHigh.description: Enhanced by Mentats. Intelligence, perception, and mental acuity significantly improved.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_MentatsHigh.label: high on Mentats
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_MentatsTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to Mentats. The more severe this tolerance is, the more Mentats it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_MentatsTolerance.label: Mentats tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_OrangeMentatsHigh.description: Enhanced perception and accuracy from Orange Mentats.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_OrangeMentatsHigh.label: high on orange Mentats
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_PartyTimeMentatsHigh.descript: Pleasant social enhancement from Party Time Mentats.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_PartyTimeMentatsHigh.label: high on party time Mentats
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_PsychoHigh.description: Enraged by Psycho. Damage output and resistance dramatically increased, but mental functions suppressed.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_PsychoHigh.label: high on Psycho
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_PsychoTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to Psycho. The more severe this tolerance is, the more Psycho it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_PsychoTolerance.label: Psycho tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_RadawayHigh.description: Rad-Away is actively purging radiation from the bloodstream. While effective, the process is exhausting.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_RadawayHigh.label: rad-away
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_RadXHigh.description: Rad-X is providing protection against radiation and toxic contamination by altering cellular structure. Side effects include minor disorientation and reduced reflexes.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_RadXHigh.label: rad-x
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_ReboundRecovery.description: Undergoing anti-addiction therapy with Rebound. This medication helps reduce withdrawal symptoms and combat chemical dependencies, though less powerfully than Addictol.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_ReboundRecovery.label: rebound recovery
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_RocketHigh.description: Enhanced speed and stamina from Rocket's unique stimulant combination.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_RocketHigh.label: high on rocket
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_SlasherHigh.description: Enhanced by Slasher. Melee damage dramatically increased, pain reduced.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_SlasherHigh.label: high on Slasher
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_SlasherTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to Slasher. The more severe this tolerance is, the more Slasher it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_SlasherTolerance.label: Slasher tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_SteadyHigh.description: Stabilized by Steady. Shooting accuracy and manipulation significantly improved.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_SteadyHigh.label: steadied
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Stimpak.description: A standard stimulation delivery system for healing injuries. The most common medical item in the wasteland. The rapid cellular regeneration causes discomfort and mild disorientation.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Stimpak.label: stimpak
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Super_Stimpak.description: A potent military-grade stimulation pack that provides rapid and extensive healing. The powerful chemicals cause considerable pain and grogginess.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Super_Stimpak.label: super stimpak
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_TurboHigh.description: Supercharged by Turbo. Perception and reflexes dramatically enhanced, movement and shooting significantly improved.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_TurboHigh.label: high on turbo
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Ultra_Stimpak.description: The pinnacle of pre-war medical technology. Provides extremely rapid and extensive healing, even mending old injuries. The intense cellular regeneration causes significant pain and exhaustion.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Ultra_Stimpak.label: ultra stimpak
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_UltrajetHigh.description: Extreme combat enhancement from combined Jet and Psycho effects. Speed and damage greatly increased, but with severe after-effects.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_UltrajetHigh.label: high on Ultrajet
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_UltrajetTolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to Ultrajet. The more severe this tolerance is, the more Ultrajet it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_UltrajetTolerance.label: Ultrajet tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_XCellHigh.description: Comprehensive enhancement of all capabilities from X-Cell.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_XCellHigh.label: high on x-cell
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_GhoulTransformation.descripti: Prolonged exposure to toxic radiation is slowly transforming this person into a ghoul. Their body is breaking down and changing at a cellular level. If the toxic buildup persists, the transformation will be complete.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_GhoulTransformation.label: radiation sickness
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Glowing_One.description: This ghoul's body emits an eerie radioactive glow. They slowly emit toxic radiation that harms nearby non-ghouls.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Glowing_One.label: glowing one
LanguageData.ToxicHealing.description: This creature's body converts toxic buildup into healing energy.
LanguageData.ToxicHealing.label: toxic metabolism
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Addiction.description: A chemical addiction to Nuka-Cola. Long-term presence of Nuka-Cola has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without the drug. Without regular doses of Nuka-Cola, withdrawal symptoms will begin.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Addiction.label: nuka-cola addiction
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Addiction.stages.1.label: unaddicted
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cherry_High.description: The sweet cherry flavor combined with Nuka-Cola's energy boost. Slightly better mood and health regeneration.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cherry_High.label: nuka-cherry buzz
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cranberry_High.description: The tartness of Nuka-Cranberry gives a pleasant lift and slightly bolsters immunity while providing steady energy.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Cranberry_High.label: cranberry lift
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Dark_High.description: The mixed effects of stimulants and alcohol from Nuka-Dark. Confidence boosted but coordination slightly impaired.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Dark_High.label: dark rum buzz
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_High.description: Energized by Nuka-Cola's proprietary blend of stimulants. Movement and work speed increased.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_High.label: nuka-cola buzz
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Ice_Cold_High.description: The crisp chill of Ice Cold Nuka sharpens the senses and quickens movement. Minor extra focus and stamina.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Ice_Cold_High.label: ice-cold clarity
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Orange_High.description: Vitamin-enriched energy from Nuka-Cola Orange. Enhanced immunity and energy.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Orange_High.label: nuka-orange boost
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quantum_High.description: The extreme stimulant effects of Nuka-Cola Quantum. Massive boost to all capabilities, but at a cost.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quantum_High.label: quantum rush
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quartz_High.description: The refined effects of Nuka-Cola Quartz. Clear-headed energy and reduced fatigue.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Quartz_High.label: quartz clarity
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Tolerance.description: A built-up tolerance to Nuka-Cola products. The more severe this tolerance is, the more Nuka-Cola it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Tolerance.label: nuka-cola tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Twist_High.description: The citrus tang of Nuka-Twist lifts mood and grants a quick burst of energy and alertness.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Twist_High.label: twist zest
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Victory_High.description: The premium boost from Nuka-Cola Victory. Enhanced combat and work performance.
LanguageData.FCP_Nuka_Cola_Victory_High.label: victory surge
LanguageData.Nukashine_High.description: Extremely intoxicated from Nukashine. Everything feels amazing but cognitive function is severely impaired. May cause blackouts.
LanguageData.Nukashine_High.label: nukashine stupor
LanguageData.Nukashine_High.stages.0.label: tipsy
LanguageData.Nukashine_High.stages.1.label: drunk
LanguageData.Nukashine_High.stages.2.label: hammered
LanguageData.Nukashine_High.stages.3.label: blackout drunk
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_PRC_Stealth_System.descriptio: An integrated stealth field system built into Chinese stealth armor. This advanced pre-war technology provides the wearer with active camouflage capabilities through a network of light-bending projectors woven into the suit's fabric.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_PRC_Stealth_System.label: stealth field emitter
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Laser_Burn.description: A laser burn with minimal pain.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Laser_Burn.label: laser burn
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Plasma_Burn.description: A plasma burn with minimal pain.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Plasma_Burn.label: plasma burn
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Power_Armor_Empty_Fusion_Core: Your power armor is out of fusion cores!
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_ToxHeal.label: sterilized
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_VatsLink.description: A neurally linked targeting computer which provides the pawn with the RimTech Assisisted Targeting System.
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_VatsLink.label: V.A.T.S. neural link
LanguageData.FCP_VATSCrippledHediff.label: crippled
LanguageData.FCP_VATSCrippledHediff.stages.0.label: crippled
LanguageData.FCP_VATSPoisoning.label: poisoned
LanguageData.FCP_VATSPoisoning.stages.0.label: recovering
LanguageData.FCP_VATSPoisoning.stages.1.label: major
LanguageData.FCP_VATSPoisoning.stages.2.label: initial
LanguageData.FCP_Deathclaw_Strength.description: The powerful nutrients from deathclaw meat enhance physical capabilities.
LanguageData.FCP_Deathclaw_Strength.label: deathclaw strength
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Stew_High.description: An aggressive surge of energy from cook-cook's spicy stew, boosting combat prowess but causing minor pain.
LanguageData.FCP_Fiend_Stew_High.label: fiend rage
LanguageData.FCP_Hearty_Meal.description: A nutritious meal providing energy and focus for work.
LanguageData.FCP_Hearty_Meal.label: hearty meal
LanguageData.FCP_Lavish_Meal_Boost.description: An exceptionally well-balanced meal providing comprehensive stat improvements.
LanguageData.FCP_Lavish_Meal_Boost.label: lavish nutrition
LanguageData.FCP_Prime_Meal_Boost.description: High-quality protein enhancing overall health and vitality.
LanguageData.FCP_Prime_Meal_Boost.label: premium nutrition
LanguageData.FCP_Toxic_Sausage.description: Minor toxic buildup from consuming poorly prepared or contaminated wasteland food.
LanguageData.FCP_Toxic_Sausage.label: wasteland toxins
LanguageData.FCP_Toxic_Sausage.stages.1.label: mild
LanguageData.FCP_Toxic_Sausage.stages.2.label: moderate
